title: Nonlinear inference capacity of fiber-optical extreme learning machines

methodology.approach: Utilizes process-intrinsic, nonlinear mode interactions from natural waveguide dynamics as a computing resource
methodology.implementation: Learning machine comprises multiple virtual nodes coupled by intrinsic feed-forward propagation dynamics of a single optical component (fiber)
methodology.type: Form of reservoir computing without internal recurrence

experimental_demonstrations: Nonlinear coupling of spatial modes in multimode fibers
Spectral frequency generation in single-mode fibers
challenges_addressed: Electro-optical bottleneck in deep all-optical architectures
